ead.archdesc:
======= RMA02374Sally Hoyt Spofford papers21-18-2374Compiled by A. Mcfadden, Mary WarrenDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
March 20022B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
cals ornitThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:16:18 UTC.ENG12/07/2018

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Sally Hoyt Spofford papers
Spofford, Sally Hoyt.
21-18-2374
3.3 cubic feet. 3.3 cubic feet.
1923-1982. Letters, manuscripts, notes, books, photographs, and drawings Correspondence, notes, manuscripts, and memoranda pertaining to the administration of the Laboratory of Ornithology and her other interests in ornithology; rough drafts of Arthur A. Allen correspondence and writings; Edna Lane's Bird and Flying Squirrel field notes; Christmas newsletters with photographs from Peter Paul Kellogg; and J. Southgate Hoyt field notes, manuscripts, drawings, a draft of his Ph.D. thesis, and photographs, primarily relating to the pileated woodpecker. Also, Arthur Allen slides that match Bird Song records and files relating to the Federation of New York State Bird Clubs. Collection material in English 2086099
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
A. Macfaddedn, Mary Warren
Date completed:
April 1988-June 1993
EAD encoding:
Peter Martinez, March 1, 2001
Date modified:
RMC Staff, June 2014
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Ornithologist, Administrative Assistant at the Cornell University Laboratory of Ornithology.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Laboratory of Ornithology and Personal Correspondence
Box 1
Series II. Arthur A. Allen Drafts
Box 1
Series III. Southgate Y. Hoyt and Sally Hoyt Spofford Papers
Boxes 1-4
Cite As:
Sally Hoyt Spofford Papers, #21-18-2374. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Correspondence, notes, manuscripts, and memoranda pertaining to the administration of the Laboratory of Ornithology and her other interests in ornithology; rough drafts of Arthur A. Allen correspondence and writings; Edna Lane's Bird and Flying Squirrel field notes; Christmas newsletters with photographs from Peter Paul Kellogg; and J. Southgate Hoyt field notes, manuscripts, drawings, a draft of his Ph.D. thesis, and photographs, primarily relating to the pileated woodpecker. Also, Arthur Allen slides that match Bird Song records and files relating to the Federation of New York State Bird Clubs.
Photographs. Woodpeckers. Bird refuges -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Ornithology -- Study and teaching. Allen, Arthur A. (Arthur Augustus), 1885-1964. Kellogg, Peter Paul, 1899-1975. Hoyt, John Southgate Yeaton, 1913-1951. Cornell University. Laboratory of Ornithology

Scope and Contents
Includes a note to Charles Smith from "Sally and Spoff" from 1991Laboratory of Ornithology newsletters1970-197752Photograph of Federation Bird Group195453Federation of New York State Bird Clubs (1)1954-196154Federation of New York State Bird Clubs (2)1954-196155State Bird Book1954-195656Arthur Allen's discarded conservation lecture notes1936-194857Bird sighting notes1938-194158
Scope and Contents
Includes an hand-drawn map of Sapsucker Woods with notations of bird sighting from 1935-1941The 1957-1958 New Zealand-Australia Expedition of the Laboratory of Ornithology195851Arthur Allen slides that match bird song recordsundated6Arthur Allen slides that match bird song records; other Arthur Allen slidesundated7Negatives of Pileated Woodpecker work by J.S.
